query: Pick up DX-300 and process it through danx-next.
Create an epic for the new authentication overhaul and split it into 4 phase cards.
Make a card for the bug where dispatches occasionally produce duplicate retro comments.
Add a comment to issue card DX-279 summarizing today's progress.
Move DX-99 from ToDo to Blocked and populate the blocked record with a reason.
Read the YAML at .danxbot/issues/open/DX-244.yml and tell me what work is left on it.
Create a ticket for the missing test coverage on src/worker/auto-sync.ts.
Split this large feature into phases — each phase its own separate card under a new epic.
Write a draft YAML for a Bug card and call mcp__danx-issue__danx_issue_create on it.
Append a comment to DX-279 with the verdict from the test-reviewer subagent run.
Read the Trello config at .danxbot/config/trello.yml — different subdir from the YAML store.
Update README.md to document the parent-and-child rollup workflow for tracker-mirrored items.
Build a dashboard component IssueDetail.vue that renders the retro section of a tracker item.
Add an 'assigned_agent' column to the dashboard's issues table SQL view.
Write a unit test for parseIssueYaml in src/issue-tracker/yaml.test.ts using inline fixture strings — purely in-memory.
Refactor parseIssueYaml in src/issue-tracker/yaml.ts to split the validator from the loader.
Add the term 'tracker entry' to the glossary in docs/terminology.md.
Run the SQL migration that adds an 'assigned_agent' column to the issues Postgres table.
Update the comment block in src/issue-tracker/yaml.ts that mentions 'schema_version 7' to reference DX-280.
Bump the schema_version literal in src/issue-tracker/yaml.ts from 6 to 7 — code change in the library, no YAML store interaction.
